vulnerability.reason: generated describes lack of anonymization tools and wearer unawareness, while reference focuses on high-resolution video capturing kitchen layout and artifacts enabling identity inference
vulnerability.reference: High-resolution ego video captures kitchen layout and personal artifacts enabling identity inference.
vulnerability.generated: Absence of ego-visual anonymization tools and wearers' unawareness of inferable attributes from first-person footage leaves them unable to prevent cross-view linkage.

impact.reason: affects wearer, and social evaluation covers social shaming based on inferred skill
impact.reference: Leaked identity enables targeted advertising or social shaming based on inferred skill level.
impact.generated: Leakage of identity, demographics, and cooking skill erodes personal privacy, enabling social evaluation and discriminatory profiling of the wearer.

dose_response.reason: arc includes cross-view retrieval models inferring attributes leading to privacy harm, but adds extraneous enabling conditions (domestic smart-glass recording, lack of anonymization) not in reference's direct ego-to-exo linkage
dose_response.reference: Cross-view retrieval models link ego-cooking footage to public exo-cooking videos, inferring identity and skill, enabling targeted advertising and social shaming.
dose_response.generated: Retrieval-augmented cross-view models infer wearer attributes from exocentric data; through domestic smart-glass recording, lack of anonymization and wearer unawareness enables cross-view linkage, leaking identity, demographics, and skill that erodes privacy, social evaluation, and profiling.
